modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: User unable to access USD Dual Credit website due to forgotten login.

full_description_text: The user reported that they cannot log into the USD Dual Credit application website because they have forgotten their login credentials. This issue is preventing them from accessing their account and completing necessary tasks related to their dual credit courses. The user is seeking assistance to recover their login information.
short_description: User unable to access USD Dual Credit website due to forgotten login.
description: The user reported that they cannot log into the USD Dual Credit application website because they have forgotten their login credentials. This issue is preventing them from accessing their account and completing necessary tasks related to their dual credit courses. The user is seeking assistance to recover their login information.
